title: Prove Heimlern usefulness with real Grabowski outcomes
goal: Add the smallest explicit, opt-in Grabowski producer for real redacted routing outcomes, pass a bounded real sample through Chronik and the existing Heimlern consumer, and decide from recorded evidence whether Heimlern improves an operator diagnosis or decision before any Bureau or Leitstand product surface is expanded.

acceptance.assertion: The producer derives bounded route, outcome, reward, friction and evidence fields from typed execution receipts; missing evidence yields a typed refusal rather than invented values.
Every output validates against the pinned Heimlern payload contract and the merged Chronik transport envelope with deterministic payload and event digests.
Raw logs, command output, secrets, private absolute paths and unbounded free text are excluded or rejected before append.
Production append is explicit and opt-in; dry-run and fixture validation are the default and duplicate event ids are idempotent.
A reviewed proof uses at least ten real redacted outcomes and includes both successful and blocked or failed execution results; synthetic duplication must not be used to satisfy the minimum.

The resulting Heimlern report or proposal is compared with a manual operator review and classified as useful, insufficient-evidence or misleading, with the affected diagnosis or decision and supporting evidence recorded.

If the bounded proof produces no materially useful diagnosis or proposal, Heimlern remains frozen, T004 is not promoted, and no broader model, event family, dashboard or automatic collection is added merely to manufacture usefulness.
The producer and proof cannot apply Heimlern proposals, change route weights, dispatch tasks or weaken Grabowski execution gates.
Focused tests cover success, missing evidence, digest drift, redaction, duplicate append and transport failure; any live proof occurs only after reviewed deployment and remains non-applying.

metadata.reason_separate_task: Fixture-equivalent consumers and display contracts cannot establish that Heimlern improves a real operator diagnosis or decision.
metadata.sequencing_decision: Real-outcome usefulness must be evaluated before Bureau review workflow or Leitstand projection work.
